  "findings": [
    "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) gas line is not bonded to the electrical grounding system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a bonding jumper from the CSST gas piping system to the electrical service grounding electrode system or the service equipment enclosure."
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST gas piping systems must be bonded to prevent electrical arcing from nearby lightning strikes or electrical faults, which can puncture the thin-walled tubing and cause gas leaks or fires. Per NEC 250.104, the bonding jumper must be sized in accordance with Table 250.102(C)(1) and connected to an accessible location.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
